title: Blumea junghuhniana
taxonomy: Blumea junghuhniana is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Indonesia. Blumea junghuhniana is classified as a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Blumea, which contains around 100 species. The plant is further classified under the subfamily Carduoideae. As a member of the Asteraceae family, Blumea junghuhniana is closely related to other daisy-like plants.

intro: Blumea junghuhniana is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to Southeast Asia and used in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are beneficial in treating various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
